name: beui-notification-stack
title: Notification Stack
author: Saurabh Chauhan
description: Expands a compact stack of caller-provided notices on hover, focus, or tap.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports and renamed the bundled action-swap support import.
Made the expanded accessible label describe collapse when no view-all action exists.
Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports.
Normalized source formatting without changing the action-swap runtime.
Moved roll and cascade filter interpolation off springs to prevent invalid negative blur values.

modifications.change: Repointed and renamed bundled support imports, normalized support formatting, and corrected the expanded label.
modifications.reason: Install the full copied dependency closure without collisions and keep the announced action consistent with runtime behavior.

modifications.change: Changed project aliases to bundled relative imports. Normalized source formatting and bounded roll and cascade filter interpolation.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied dependency closure portable at its registry installation targets.
